# Deprecated

This slash prompt has been replaced by the **`agent-builder`** custom agent.

Switch to the `agent-builder` mode (agent picker → ZavaShop → agent-builder) and ask:

```
Generate src/agents/<name>/ following the AGENTS.md house rules.
```

`agent-builder.agent.md` carries the right tools, skills, and refusal rules. This file is retained only so that older labs do not break links.
